description: Swedish double-entry bookkeeping ledger line — modeled on the PerfectBook (bookie) app's SIE/BAS data shape. One row = one transaction line on a voucher (verifikation). Amounts in kronor, positive = debit, negative = credit (SIE convention). Hash-chain immutability + report generation live in the PerfectBook app; the engine validates the ledger rows.

account.pattern_message: BAS account must be a 4-digit number, e.g. 1930, 3001, 2641

amount.pattern_message: amount in kronor, up to 2 decimals; positive = debit, negative = credit
amount.fix: Kronor with '.' as decimal separator (e.g. 12.50); positive = debit, negative = credit.

voucher_series.pattern_message: voucher series is 1-3 uppercase letters, e.g. A, V, INV
voucher_series.fix: Use 1-3 uppercase letters, e.g. A, V, INV.

voucher_number.pattern_message: voucher number must be a positive integer

vat_code.pattern_message: vat_code: SE25, SE12, SE06, RC, EU, EXPORT, or NONE
vat_code.fix: Use one of: SE25, SE12, SE06, RC, EU, EXPORT, NONE (no hyphens).
